name: guvflow-research
task: research and analyze the audit findings and compose recommendations
playbook_description: Research a topic, competitor, technology, or market and synthesize recommendations.

alternates.description: Review code or architecture for security risk.

workflow.validation: cite concrete sources or repo evidence
workflow.recovery: if sources are unavailable, mark claims as unverified

steps.reason: Define the decision the research must support.
Stop at the smallest evidence-backed recommendation.

skills.name: scan-analyze
skills.summary: Turn a StructureSnapshot into structured findings: deterministic rules then LLM-enrichment

skills.name: compose-recommendations
skills.summary: Merge findings + researcher report into one normalized, de-duplicated, ranked recommendation bundle

skills.name: cost-savings
skills.summary: Derive cost-savings estimates from detected tools + spend + pricing (current/recommended/savings USD/mo)
